project_overview.animation_style: Micro-interactions, 3D card tilt, neon glow pulses, morphing buttons, confetti bursts, spring physics, haptic-synced animations
project_overview.font: Inter / SF Pro Display, bold headings with tight letter-spacing

screens.name: Splash Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile app splash screen for a wallpaper app called "WallVault". Deep black background (#0A0A0F). Centered stylized "W" logo that draws with an animated neon purple (#B829DD) stroke effect, then fills with a purple-to-cyan gradient. Below the logo, the tagline "Your Walls, Your Story" types in with a cursor blink animation. At 1.8 seconds, particles burst from the logo and the screen fades. Premium, dark, minimal. No buttons, no navigation.
screens.animation_notes: 2.5s total duration, auto-navigate after animation

screens.name: Onboarding - Slide 1
screens.prompt: Mobile onboarding screen for WallVault wallpaper app. Deep black background with subtle parallax wallpaper images floating in 3D space (slightly tilted cards showing nature and abstract wallpapers). Large bold white heading "Discover Stunning Walls" at top. Subtext "Explore thousands of 4K wallpapers curated just for you" in gray (#8B8B9E). Bottom has a "Swipe to explore →" hint with a pulsing arrow. Dark theme, premium feel, CRED app inspired.
screens.animation_notes: Tilt phone to parallax wallpapers

screens.name: Onboarding - Slide 2
screens.prompt: Mobile onboarding screen for WallVault. Deep black background (#0A0A0F). Center shows golden coins raining down animation with creator avatar circles popping in with stagger. Large white heading "Support Creators". Subtext "Buy wallpapers directly from independent artists and tip your favorites" in gray. Bottom "Next" button with neon purple gradient and rounded corners. Premium dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Coins rain continuously, avatars pop with 100ms stagger

screens.name: Onboarding - Slide 3
screens.prompt: Mobile onboarding screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Center shows a golden padlock with a key turning animation, then the lock opens with a satisfying click visual. Confetti particles burst out. Large white heading "Go Premium". Subtext "Unlock exclusive wallpapers, remove ads, and support the community" in gray. Bottom "Get Started" button with gold gradient (#FFD700). Premium, celebratory feel.
screens.animation_notes: Lock opens at 0.8s, confetti at 1.0s

screens.name: Login Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile login screen for WallVault wallpaper app. Deep black background with a subtle blurred wallpaper image as background overlay (20% opacity). Centered app logo (stylized W) at top. Two input fields: "Phone Number" and "Password" with rounded corners, dark card surface (#1A1A24), glowing purple border on focus. Large "Continue" button with neon purple gradient (#B829DD to #00D4FF), rounded corners, subtle shadow. Below: "or continue with" divider, then Google and Apple social login buttons. Bottom text: "New here? Sign Up" in cyan (#00D4FF). Premium, minimal, CRED-inspired.
screens.animation_notes: Fields float up on focus with glow border, button has press scale 0.95

screens.name: Sign Up Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile sign up screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Step indicator at top: "Step 1/4" with progress dots. Heading "Create Your Account" in bold white. Input fields: Full Name, Phone Number, Email, Password — all with dark card surface (#1A1A24), rounded corners, purple glow on focus. "Continue" button with gradient. At bottom: "Already have an account? Login" in cyan. Clean, premium, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Fields slide in from right with 100ms stagger

screens.name: OTP Verification Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile OTP verification screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Heading "Verify Your Number" in bold white. Subtext "Enter the 6-digit code sent to +91 98765 43210" in gray. Six square input boxes in a row, each 48x48px, dark card surface (#1A1A24), rounded 12px, with cyan (#00D4FF) border when active. Numbers bounce in with spring animation when typed. Below: "Didn't receive? Resend (30s)" in gray. "Verify" button with purple gradient. Premium, minimal.
screens.animation_notes: Numbers bounce in with spring, boxes scale on focus

screens.name: Home Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile home screen for WallVault wallpaper app. Deep black background (#0A0A0F). Top section: greeting "Good Morning, Alex" in white, fire emoji with "7-day streak!" in orange, search icon and profile avatar on right. Below: horizontal tab bar "For You | Trending | Categories | Creators" with a liquid morph animated indicator in purple. Featured section: horizontal scroll carousel of large wallpaper cards (280px wide) with "PREMIUM" or "NEW" badges. Below: 2-column masonry grid of wallpaper cards, each showing wallpaper preview, name, creator avatar with verified checkmark, download count, and price tag (gold for paid, green for free). Cards have subtle border glow on hover. Bottom floating action button (circular, purple gradient) for upload. Premium, dark, CRED-inspired with neon accents.
screens.animation_notes: Cards fade up with 50ms stagger on scroll, tab indicator morphs liquid-like, FAB has subtle float animation

screens.name: Wallpaper Detail Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile wallpaper detail screen for WallVault. Full-bleed wallpaper image taking top 70% of screen with pinch-to-zoom capability. Top overlay: back arrow, heart favorite button, and more options (three dots) in white with blur backdrop. Bottom 30%: draggable sheet with dark card surface (#1A1A24), rounded top corners (24px). Inside sheet: wallpaper name "Neon Sunset" in bold white, creator row with avatar + "@creative_alex" in cyan with blue verified checkmark, star rating 4.9, download count "12.5K downloads" in gray. Tags as pill badges: #nature #neon #abstract. Resolution badge "4K (3840x2160)". Price tag "₹49" in gold (#FFD700) for paid wallpapers. Action buttons row: "Download" (purple gradient, morphing button), "Apply" (cyan outline), "Share" (gray outline), "Tip Creator" (gold coin icon). Premium, immersive, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Shared element transition from grid, sheet slides up with spring, download button morphs to progress → checkmark → confetti

screens.name: Apply Wallpaper Modal
screens.prompt: Mobile bottom sheet modal for applying wallpaper in WallVault. Dark card surface (#1A1A24), rounded top corners (24px). Heading "Preview & Apply" in white. Two side-by-side preview cards: left labeled "Home Screen" showing wallpaper behind simulated app icons, right labeled "Lock Screen" showing wallpaper behind simulated clock and notifications. Both cards have rounded corners and subtle border. Below: three full-width buttons stacked: "Apply to Home Screen" (purple gradient), "Apply to Lock Screen" (cyan gradient), "Apply to Both" (gold gradient). Bottom: "Cancel" text button in gray. Premium, dark, minimal.
screens.animation_notes: Sheet slides up with spring, previews scale in with 150ms stagger

screens.name: Search Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile search screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: expanded search bar with glowing purple border, search icon, and "Search wallpapers..." placeholder in gray. Below: "Trending Searches" section with pill-shaped tags (#nature, #neon, #minimal, #dark, #anime) in dark card surface with cyan text. "Recent Searches" section below with history items and X clear buttons. "Popular Categories" grid: 2x3 grid of category cards with icon + label (Nature, Abstract, Cars, Anime, Space, Dark). Premium, dark, clean.
screens.animation_notes: Tags stagger in from left, categories fade up

screens.name: Profile Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile profile screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: settings gear icon. Center: large circular avatar (100px) with 3D tilt on touch, username "@alex_wallz" in bold white, "Member since 2024" in gray. Stats row: three columns — "247 Downloads", "89 Favorites", "12 Following" with animated number counters. Divider line. "Subscription" section with PRO badge in gold, "Active until Dec 2026", "Manage Subscription" button. Menu list: My Downloads, My Favorites, My Uploads (with "Creator" badge), Notifications, Dark Mode toggle (animated sun/moon morph), Language, Help & Support, Log Out (red text). Each row has right arrow. Premium, dark, CRED-inspired.
screens.animation_notes: Numbers count up on screen enter, avatar tilts 3D on touch, toggle morphs sun to moon

screens.name: My Downloads Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile downloads screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: back arrow + "My Downloads" heading. Below: 2-column grid of downloaded wallpaper cards. Each card shows wallpaper preview, name, and an offline indicator (cloud with checkmark) in green. Long-press enters multi-select mode with haptic feedback. Selected items show checkmark overlay. Bottom action bar appears in multi-select: "Delete" (red), "Share", "Apply". Premium, dark, minimal.
screens.animation_notes: Cards fade up with stagger, multi-select mode scales cards slightly

screens.name: Creator Enrollment - Step 1
screens.prompt: Mobile creator enrollment screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: "Become a Creator" heading, "Step 1/4" with progress bar (25% filled in purple). Section "Basic Info". Input fields: Display Name, Bio (multiline), both with dark card surface and purple glow on focus. "Upload Profile Photo" area: large dashed border box with camera icon and "Tap to upload" text. Bottom: "Next" button with purple gradient. Premium, dark, form-focused.
screens.animation_notes: Fields slide in from right, progress bar animates fill

screens.name: Creator Enrollment - Step 2
screens.prompt: Mobile creator enrollment screen for WallVault. Step 2/4, progress bar 50%. Heading "Upload Portfolio". Subtext "Upload 3 sample wallpapers to showcase your style". Three upload slots in a row, each showing either a dashed border placeholder with "+" icon or a thumbnail preview with remove X button. Dark card surface (#1A1A24). "Next" button enabled only when 3 uploads complete. Premium, dark, minimal.
screens.animation_notes: Images drop in with bounce, remove button spins on tap

screens.name: Creator Enrollment - Step 3
screens.prompt: Mobile creator enrollment screen for WallVault. Step 3/4, progress bar 75%. Heading "Payout Setup". Subtext "How you'll receive your earnings". Two options as cards: "UPI" (selected by default) with input field for UPI ID (abc@upi), and "Razorpay Connect" with "Link Account" button. Info text: "Minimum payout: ₹500" in gray. "Next" button with purple gradient. Premium, dark, financial feel.
screens.animation_notes: Cards slide in, selected card gets purple border glow

screens.name: Creator Enrollment - Step 4
screens.prompt: Mobile creator enrollment screen for WallVault. Step 4/4, progress bar 100% (animated fill). Heading "Review & Submit". Summary card showing: Display Name, Bio preview, 3 portfolio thumbnails, payout method. Checkbox: "I agree to the Creator Terms and Conditions" with link. "Submit Application" button with rocket icon, purple gradient. On submit: rocket launch animation with particle trail. Premium, celebratory, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Progress bar fills to 100%, rocket launches on submit with trail

screens.name: Creator Dashboard Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile creator dashboard for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: creator avatar with verified badge, username "@creative_alex", level badge "Level 3: Bloom ⭐" in gold. Earnings card: "Total Earnings ₹12,450" with animated number counter, "↑ 23% this month" in green. Below: line chart showing earnings over last 7 days with gradient fill (purple to transparent). "Top Wallpapers" list: ranked 1-3 with wallpaper thumbnail, name, download count bar that animates fill. "Payout Status" card: "Available: ₹2,450" with "Request Payout" button in gold gradient. Bottom nav: My Uploads, Analytics, Settings, Help. Premium, data-rich, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Numbers count up, chart draws on enter, bars fill with gradient

screens.name: Creator Upload - Step 1
screens.prompt: Mobile wallpaper upload screen for WallVault creators. Deep black background. Top: "Upload Wallpaper" heading, "Step 1/3" progress. Large drag-and-drop zone: dashed border in purple, centered upload icon with "Tap to select or drag wallpaper here". Below: preview area showing selected wallpaper with crop guide overlay (9:16 ratio lines). "Wallpaper Name" input field. "Next" button. Premium, creator-focused, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Image drops in with bounce, crop guides animate in

screens.name: Creator Upload - Step 2
screens.prompt: Mobile wallpaper upload screen for WallVault. Step 2/3. Heading "Add Details". Wallpaper preview thumbnail at top. Fields: Category dropdown (Nature, Abstract, Cars, etc.), Tags input with auto-suggest pills (#nature, #neon), Description multiline text area. All fields have dark card surface (#1A1A24) and purple glow on focus. "Next" button. Premium, form-focused, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Fields slide in with stagger, tags pop in when selected

screens.name: Creator Upload - Step 3 (Pricing)
screens.prompt: Mobile wallpaper pricing screen for WallVault creators. Step 3/3. Heading "Set Pricing". Two toggle cards: "Free" (selected by default, green border) and "Paid" (unselected, gray). When "Paid" selected: price input field with ₹ prefix, animated number counter. Below: earnings breakdown card showing "Your Earnings: ₹34 (70%)" in green, "Platform Fee: ₹10 (20%)" in gray, "Community: ₹5 (10%)" in cyan. Payout method display: "UPI: abc@upi" with edit icon. "Publish" button with rocket icon, purple gradient. On tap: rocket launch animation. Premium, financial, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Toggle morphs card shape, numbers animate on price change, rocket launches on publish

screens.name: Creator Payout Request Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile payout request screen for WallVault creators. Deep black background. Top: "Request Payout" heading with back arrow. Balance card: large "₹2,450" in gold with "Available Balance" label. "Amount to Withdraw" input with ₹ prefix and max button. Below: "Payout Method" card showing UPI ID with verified checkmark. "Minimum payout: ₹500" info text in gray. "Request Payout" button with gold gradient, pulsing glow. Bottom: "Payout History" link. Premium, financial, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Balance number counts up, button has idle pulse glow

screens.name: Subscription / Premium Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile premium subscription screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: "Go Premium" heading with crown icon in gold. Hero section: large golden lock that unlocks with animation, confetti burst. Three plan cards stacked vertically: "Monthly" ₹49/month, "Yearly" ₹299/year ("Save 49%" badge in green, recommended), "Lifetime" ₹999 one-time ("Best Value" badge in gold). Each card shows feature checklist with checkmarks. Selected plan gets golden border glow. "Subscribe Now" button with gold gradient, pulsing. Bottom: "Restore Purchases" link. Premium, celebratory, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Lock unlocks on enter, confetti bursts, selected card glows gold

screens.name: Notifications Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile notifications screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: "Notifications" heading with back arrow, "Mark all read" text button. List of notification cards: each has icon (download, coin, message, alert), title in white, description in gray, timestamp in muted gray. Unread notifications have purple left border accent and subtle background glow. Swipe right to dismiss with red background. Empty state: "No notifications yet" with bell icon. Premium, dark, clean.
screens.animation_notes: Cards slide in with stagger, swipe reveals red dismiss background

screens.name: Settings Screen
screens.prompt: Mobile settings screen for WallVault. Deep black background. Top: "Settings" heading with back arrow. Grouped sections with headers: "Account" (Edit Profile, Change Password, Delete Account in red), "Preferences" (Notifications toggle, Dark Mode toggle with sun/moon morph animation, Language selector), "Support" (Help Center, Contact Us, Terms of Service), "About" (App Version, Rate App, Share App). Each row has icon, label, and right arrow or toggle. Premium, organized, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Toggles snap with elastic animation, rows fade in with stagger

screens.name: Creator Web - Dashboard
screens.prompt: Desktop web dashboard for WallVault creator portal. Dark theme (#0A0A0F background). Left sidebar navigation: Dashboard, Upload, My Wallpapers, Analytics, Payouts, Settings — each with icon and label, active item has purple left border and glow. Top bar: search icon, notification bell with badge, profile avatar. Main content: four KPI cards in a row — "Total Earnings ₹12,450" (green up arrow), "Total Downloads 45.2K", "Wallpapers 89", "Avg Rating 4.8". Below: large earnings line chart with purple gradient fill, interactive hover tooltips. "Recent Uploads" grid: 4 wallpaper thumbnails with status badges. "Quick Actions" row: "+ Upload New" (purple), "View Analytics" (cyan), "Request Payout" (gold). Premium, data-rich, dark, CRED-inspired.
screens.animation_notes: Cards stagger in, chart draws on load, numbers count up

screens.name: Creator Web - Upload Interface
screens.prompt: Desktop web upload interface for WallVault creator portal. Dark theme. Left sidebar navigation. Main area: "Upload New Wallpaper" heading. Large drag-and-drop zone: dashed purple border, centered cloud upload icon with "Drag & drop or click to upload" text, "Supports: JPG, PNG, WEBP (Max 20MB)" below. Below drop zone: wallpaper preview with crop tools. Form fields: Wallpaper Name, Category dropdown, Tags input with auto-suggest, Description textarea. Pricing section: "Free" and "Paid" radio cards, when Paid selected: price input with ₹ prefix, live earnings calculator showing "You earn: ₹X (70%)". Payout method display. "Preview" and "Publish" buttons at bottom. Premium, form-focused, dark.
screens.animation_notes: File drops in with bounce, earnings number updates live with animation

screens.name: Creator Web - Analytics
screens.prompt: Desktop web analytics page for WallVault creator portal. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Main area: "Analytics" heading with date range picker. Top row: three stat cards — "Views 45.2K", "Downloads 8.1K", "Earnings ₹3,200 this month". Below: two charts side by side — left: bar chart "Downloads by Wallpaper" with purple bars, right: donut chart "Downloads by Category" with neon colors. Below: heatmap calendar showing download activity by day (darker = more downloads). "Top Performing Wallpapers" table with columns: Wallpaper, Views, Downloads, Earnings, Trend sparkline. Premium, data-dense, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Charts animate draw-on-enter, heatmap cells fade in by intensity

screens.name: Creator Web - Payout Management
screens.prompt: Desktop web payouts page for WallVault creator portal. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Main area: "Payouts" heading. Balance card: large "₹2,450" in gold with "Available Balance" and "Request Payout" gold button. Below: "Payout History" table with columns: Date, Amount, Method, Status (green checkmark for completed, orange clock for pending), Transaction ID. Each row has hover highlight. "Export CSV" button top-right. Empty state: "No payouts yet" with wallet icon. Premium, financial, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Table rows fade in with stagger, status icons pop in

screens.name: Admin Web - Dashboard Overview
screens.prompt: Desktop web admin dashboard for WallVault. Dark theme (#0A0A0F). Left sidebar: Dashboard, Wallpapers, Creators, Users, Payments, Payouts, Reports, Settings. Top bar: search, notification bell with red badge "5", admin profile dropdown. Main content: six KPI cards in 2 rows of 3 — "Total Users 45.2K" (up 12%), "Total Wallpapers 12.8K" (up 8%), "Active Subscriptions 3.2K" (up 15%), "Monthly Revenue ₹89K" (up 22%), "Pending Approvals 23" (alert pulse in orange), "Payouts Due 8" (alert pulse). Below: two charts — revenue area chart with gradient, user growth line chart. "Action Required" alert box: "23 wallpapers pending approval [Review Now →]", "5 creators pending verification [Review Now →]", "8 payout requests pending [Process Now →]". Premium, data-dense, admin-focused, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Cards stagger in, alert badges pulse, charts draw on load

screens.name: Admin Web - Wallpaper Management
screens.prompt: Desktop web wallpaper management page for WallVault admin. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Top: "Wallpapers" heading, filter dropdown, search bar. Tab bar: All, Pending, Approved, Rejected, Flagged — with count badges. Below: grid view of wallpaper thumbnails (6 per row), each showing preview, status badge (pending=orange clock, approved=green check, rejected=red X, flagged=red alert), creator name. Bulk select checkbox on each. Top action bar appears on selection: "Approve", "Reject", "Delete" buttons. Click opens detail modal: large preview left, metadata right (name, creator, upload date, resolution, price, status), action buttons. Premium, content-management, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Grid items fade in, modal scales in from center, badges pop

screens.name: Admin Web - Creator Management
screens.prompt: Desktop web creator management page for WallVault admin. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Top: "Creators" heading, search, filters. Two sections: "Pending Approvals" (5 items) — card list with creator avatar, name, upload count, payout method, document preview icon, Approve/Reject/View buttons. "All Creators" table with columns: Name, Level (with emoji badge), Uploads, Earnings, Payouts, Status (Active/Suspended), Actions (View, Edit, Suspend). Sortable headers. Row hover highlight. Premium, admin-focused, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Pending cards slide in, table rows fade in with stagger

screens.name: Admin Web - Payout Management
screens.prompt: Desktop web payout management page for WallVault admin. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Top: "Payouts" heading. "Pending Payouts" table: columns Creator, Amount, Method, Requested Date, Action (Process button in gold). "Process All" button top-right. "Payout History" table below: Date, Creator, Amount, Method, Status (green checkmark), Transaction ID. Each completed row has green left border. "Export CSV" button. Summary cards: "Total Processed ₹45K", "Pending ₹12K", "Failed ₹0". Premium, financial, admin-focused, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Tables fade in, process button has idle gold pulse

screens.name: Admin Web - User Management
screens.prompt: Desktop web user management page for WallVault admin. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Top: "Users" heading, search bar with filters (Status, Join Date, Subscription). User table: Avatar, Name, Email, Join Date, Downloads, Subscription (Free/Pro badge), Status (Active/Suspended dot), Actions (View, Ban, Edit). Pagination at bottom. Click row opens user detail sidebar: profile info, activity log (downloads, uploads, payments), ban button with confirmation modal. Premium, admin-focused, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Table rows stagger in, sidebar slides in from right

screens.name: Admin Web - Payment Analytics
screens.prompt: Desktop web payment analytics page for WallVault admin. Dark theme. Left sidebar. Top: "Payment Analytics" heading, date range picker. Four stat cards: "Total Revenue ₹89K", "Subscription Revenue ₹45K", "Wallpaper Sales ₹32K", "Tips ₹12K". Below: stacked area chart "Revenue Breakdown by Source" with purple, cyan, gold layers. "Payout vs Revenue" comparison bar chart. "Top Selling Wallpapers" table. "Refund/Disputes" alert section with pending items. "Export Report" button. Premium, data-dense, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Charts draw on load, alert badges pulse

screens.name: Loading / Skeleton States
screens.prompt: Loading and skeleton states for WallVault app. Dark background (#0A0A0F). Shimmer effect: animated gradient sweep (dark gray #1A1A24 to light gray #2A2A3A to dark gray) moving left to right. Skeleton cards: rounded rectangles for wallpaper thumbnails, text lines for names and stats. Circular skeleton for avatars. Pulsing dots for small loading states. Purple accent shimmer for premium content areas. Premium, smooth, dark theme.
screens.animation_notes: Shimmer sweeps continuously, dots pulse with 1.5s interval

screens.name: Empty States
screens.prompt: Empty state screens for WallVault. Dark background (#0A0A0F). Centered large illustration icon (line art style) in purple (#B829DD) or gray (#5A5A6E). Heading in white: "No downloads yet", "No favorites yet", "No uploads yet", "No notifications", "No results found". Subtext in gray with helpful action: "Browse wallpapers to get started" with link in cyan. "Add" or "Explore" CTA button with purple gradient. Premium, encouraging, minimal.
screens.animation_notes: Icon draws with SVG stroke animation, text fades in

screens.name: Error States
screens.prompt: Error state screens for WallVault. Dark background (#0A0A0F). Centered alert icon (triangle with exclamation) in red (#FF1744) with subtle pulse glow. Heading: "Something went wrong" in white. Subtext: specific error message in gray. "Retry" button with purple gradient. "Contact Support" link in cyan below. For network errors: "No internet connection" with wifi-off icon. For payment errors: "Payment failed" with card icon. Premium, reassuring, dark.
screens.animation_notes: Icon pulses red glow, retry button has shake animation on error
